ecosystemom 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • From Ecopath with Ecosim to Fisheries Integrated Modeling System

Package index

All functions

calc_truth()
Calculate "truth" for a species using ecosystem model outputs
calc_truth_agecomp_monthly()
Calculate "true" monthly age composition for a species
calc_truth_agecomp_yearly()
Calculate "true" yearly age composition for a species
calc_truth_index_monthly()
Calculate "true" monthly index for a species
calc_truth_index_yearly()
Calculate "true" yearly index for a species
calc_truth_monthly()
Calculate monthly "truth" for a species
create_dsem_inputs()
Create Structural Equation Model (SEM) Equations and Time Series Data
create_sem_equations()
Create SEM Equations from a Tibble
estimate_true_maturity()
Estimate true maturity parameters from ecosystem model input
estimate_true_selectivity()
Estimate true selectivity parameters from ecosystem model output
ewe_ecosim_base_nwatlantic ewe_ecosim_with_environmental_data_nwatlantic
Ecopath with Ecosim (EwE) models for the Northwest Atlantic
get_functional_groups()
Get the functional groups from an EwE file
load_csv_environmental_data()
Load environmental data from a CSV file
load_csv_ewe()
Load in EwE monthly output data
load_diet_composition()
Load diet composition data
load_model()
Load an ecosystem model
sample_dirichlet_multinomial()
Sample using a Dirichlet-multinomial distribution
sample_lognormal()
Sample using a lognormal distribution
sample_multinomial()
Sample using a multinomial distribution
split_functional_groups()
Split the functional groups into species and group
use_testthat_template()
Create tests/testthat/test-*.R test file

Developed by Bai Li, Kelli F. Johnson.
